commands.createSidecar: Create metadata note for active file

attachmentsFolder.name: Attachments Folder
attachmentsFolder.desc: Monitored folder. Must match Obsidian's "Default location for new attachments".

libraryFolder.name: Library Folder
libraryFolder.desc: Where metadata notes will be created.

mirrorStructure.name: Mirror subfolder structure
mirrorStructure.desc: When enabled, subfolders inside Attachments/ are replicated inside Library/.

baseFolder.name: Base file folder (Bases)
baseFolder.desc: Folder where "Attachments Library.base" will be created. Leave blank for vault root. After changing, click "Move" to move the existing file.
baseFolder.conflictWarning: A base file already exists at the destination. Replace it?

autoCreate.name: Create note when file is added

autoDelete.name: Remove note when file is deleted
autoDelete.desc: Moves the note to the system trash (reversible).

tagsPropertyName.name: Tags property name
tagsPropertyName.desc: Frontmatter field name used for tags. "tags" enables Obsidian's native tag chip UI. Changing this value does not rename the property in existing notes — use the button below.

migrateTags.name: Rename property in existing notes
migrateTags.desc: Renames a frontmatter field in all library notes, preserving values.

sanitizeTags.name: Sanitize tags in existing notes
sanitizeTags.desc: Fixes invalid tags in library notes: replaces spaces with hyphens and removes characters not allowed by Obsidian.

pdfExtraction.name: Extract embedded PDF metadata
pdfExtraction.desc: Reads title, author, subject and keywords from PDF files locally, without internet.

doiLookup.name: Online lookup via DOI/ISBN
doiLookup.desc: Queries CrossRef (DOI) and OpenLibrary (ISBN). Free, no API key required.

backfill.name: Index all existing files
backfill.desc: Creates notes for all files in Attachments/ that don't have a note yet. Does not overwrite existing notes.

backfill.complete: [Attachments Library] ✅ Indexing complete: {{created}} notes created, {{skipped}} already existed.
